title: Phoenix Heat Wave
lead: Phoenix is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.57. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Phoenix has brought extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 14%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 3.9 km/h. 
 The city's energy demand is likely to increase due to the high temperatures and low humidity.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
